changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS garage_vehicle ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL, vehicle_id BIGINT NOT NULL, category VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, notes VARCHAR(1000), is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE garage_vehicle IS 'User digital garage — links user profiles to their vehicles (OWNED or WISHLIST)';
